description: A truck has backed into and damaged a fence on the project site. The incident must be investigated.

nodes.task_description: Log a new 'Property Damage' incident report.

expected_outcome.value: The supervisor creates a new incident record.

nodes.task_description: Interview the driver and any witnesses and document their statements.

expected_outcome.value: The supervisor gathers and records information about how the incident occurred.

nodes.task_description: Determine the root cause (e.g., 'Improper use of a spotter') and create a corrective action to prevent recurrence.

expected_outcome.value: The supervisor identifies the root cause and assigns a corrective action to retrain all drivers on the site's traffic management plan.
